name: Broiled Nectarines with Brown Sugar and Sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the nectarines in half and remove any stones. Place them cut side up on a baking sheet.
2. Divide the butter among each half of the nectarines, placing a small amount in each cavity.
3. Add 1 teaspoon of Sherry and 1 teaspoon of brown sugar to the cavity of each nectarine half.
4. Broil the nectarines at a distance of 4 to 6 inches from the heat source until the topping is bubbly and the fruit is softened, approximately 5 minutes.
